displayName: ESAPI B4C Array (Enhanced Small Arms Protective Insert)
notes: B4C ceramic in an ESAPI/XSAPI backing array. Highest RHAe per mm of any fielded personal armor system (~5.0-6.0). Used in US XSAPI (eXtreme Small Arms Protective Insert) — defeated M993 AP. UHMWPE backing enables extended dwell. Lightest weight option for Level IV+ protection. Multi-hit is moderate due to B4C's lower fracture toughness.
